typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	DATE_PERIOD as string (),
	LogId as integer (),
	pFMForecastDestDB_ConString as string (),
	pFMForecastLogDB_ConString as string ()
}

source(output(
		Company as string,
		{Item No} as string,
		MINVL as string,
		Descrip as string,
		{Product Range} as string,
		{Sell-to Customer} as string,
		{Bill-to Customer No} as string,
		{Ship-to Customer} as string,
		{Ship-to Customer Name} as string,
		{Order Date} as timestamp,
		{Shipment Date} as timestamp,
		{Sales Order No} as string,
		{Document No} as string,
		{Line No} as integer,
		{Country Code} as string,
		County as string,
		Country_Code_FM_ISO2 as string,
		MKT_ID as string,
		Version as integer,
		{Customer Class Code} as string,
		Sell_to_Customer_Name as string,
		BillToName as string,
		MarsYear as integer,
		MarsPeriod as string,
		MarsWeek as string,
		YearPeriod as integer,
		Quantity as integer,
		Tonnage as integer,
		FreeTonnage as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT  CONVERT(NVARCHAR(3), (CASE WHEN A.[DATAAREAID] = \'NV1\' THEN \'PL\' ELSE A.[DATAAREAID] END)) AS Company,  A.[Item No],  COALESCE (I.MINVL, \'UNKNOWN\') AS MINVL, I.[Descrip], A.[Product Range],  A.[Sell-to Customer],  A.[Bill-to Customer No], A.[Ship-to Customer],  A.[Ship-to Customer Name], A.[Order Date], A.[Shipment Date], A.[Sales Order No], A.[Document No], A.[Line No], C.[Country Code], C.[County], (CASE WHEN A.[Ship-to Customer]=M1.[Ship_To_Code] THEN [Country_Code_FM] ELSE C.[Country Code] END) AS Country_Code_FM_ISO2, COALESCE (M.[MKT_ID], [Country Code], \'UNKNOWN\') AS MKT_ID, A.Version,  C.[Customer Class Code], C.[Name] AS Sell_to_Customer_Name, C.BillToName,  T.MarsYear,  T.MarsPeriod,  T.MarsWeek,  CAST (CAST(T.MarsYear AS varchar(10)) + RIGHT(T.MarsPeriod, 2) AS INT) AS YearPeriod, SUM(A.Quantity) AS Quantity,  SUM(A.Tonnage) AS Tonnage,  SUM(A.[Free Tonnage]) AS FreeTonnage  FROM   dbo.[EDW Sales Fact RNI] AS A  LEFT OUTER JOIN (  SELECT A.MINOS, A.DESCRIP, A.MINVL FROM dbo.Item_MASTER A INNER JOIN (  SELECT MINOS, MAX(MINVL) AS MAXMINVL FROM dbo.Item_MASTER  GROUP BY MINOS  ) B ON A.MINOS = B.MINOS AND A.MINVL = B.MAXMINVL )  I  ON A.[Item No] = I.[MINOS]  LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.[EDW Customer RNI] AS C  ON A.DATAAREAID = C.DATAAREAID  AND A.[Sell-to Customer] = C.No   LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.[EDW Time RNI] AS T  ON A.Date = T.TheDate  LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.[MKT_Recodification] AS M1  ON A.[Ship-to Customer] = M1.[Ship_To_Code]  LEFT OUTER JOIN dbo.[MKT_MASTER] AS M  ON (CASE WHEN A.[Ship-to Customer]=M1.[Ship_To_Code] THEN [Country_Code_FM] ELSE C.[Country Code] END) = M.[ISO2_MKT_ID]  WHERE  (A.[Gen Prod Posting Group] = \'FIN GOOD\')  AND (A.DATAAREAID = \'NV1\')  AND (C.[Customer Class Code] NOT IN (\'\')) AND C.City not in (\'\')  GROUP BY  A.DATAAREAID,  A.[Item No],  I.MINVL, I.[Descrip], A.[DataSource], A.[Product Range],  A.[Sell-to Customer],  A.[Bill-to Customer No], A.[Ship-to Customer],  A.[Ship-to Customer Name], A.[Order Date], A.[Shipment Date], A.[Sales Order No], A.[Document No], A.[Line No], C.[Country Code], C.[County], (CASE WHEN A.[Ship-to Customer]=M1.[Ship_To_Code] THEN [Country_Code_FM] ELSE C.[Country Code] END), COALESCE (M.[MKT_ID], [Country Code], \'UNKNOWN\'), A.Version,  C.[Customer Class Code], C.[Name],   C.BillToName,  T.MarsYear,  T.MarsPeriod,  T.MarsWeek',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> SalesFactRNI
SalesFactRNI derive(DataSource = 'Live') ~> DerivedColumnAddDataSource
DerivedColumnAddDataSource sink(input(
		Company as string,
		Descrip as string,
		Sales_Order_No as string,
		Sell_to_Customer_Name as string,
		County as string,
		Product_Range as string,
		Version as integer,
		BillToName as string,
		MarsPeriod as string,
		YearPeriod as integer,
		Country_Code_FM_ISO2 as string,
		{Ship-to_Customer} as string,
		{Sell-to_Customer} as string,
		{Ship-to_Customer_Name} as string,
		Customer_Class_Code as string,
		{Bill-to_Customer_No} as string,
		MKT_ID as string,
		Quantity as integer,
		Order_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Line_No as integer,
		MarsYear as integer,
		DataSource as string,
		Country_Code as string,
		Tonnage as integer,
		FreeTonnage as integer,
		MarsWeek as string,
		Item_No as string,
		MINVL as string,
		Document_No as string,
		Shipment_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy'
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		Company,
		Descrip,
		Sales_Order_No = {Sales Order No},
		Sell_to_Customer_Name,
		County,
		Product_Range = {Product Range},
		Version,
		BillToName,
		MarsPeriod,
		YearPeriod,
		Country_Code_FM_ISO2,
		{Ship-to_Customer} = {Ship-to Customer},
		{Sell-to_Customer} = {Sell-to Customer},
		{Ship-to_Customer_Name} = {Ship-to Customer Name},
		Customer_Class_Code = {Customer Class Code},
		{Bill-to_Customer_No} = {Bill-to Customer No},
		MKT_ID,
		Quantity,
		Order_Date = {Order Date},
		Line_No = {Line No},
		MarsYear,
		DataSource,
		Country_Code = {Country Code},
		Tonnage,
		FreeTonnage,
		MarsWeek,
		Item_No = {Item No},
		MINVL,
		Document_No = {Document No},
		Shipment_Date = {Shipment Date})) ~> SalesActualsRNI
